secondary.name: Space Mono
secondary.usage: Body text, meta data, prices, small labels

usage_rules.accent_hot: text-[#FF1F1F] or bg-[#FF1F1F] (Use for CTAs and Graffiti highlights)

drip_effect.instruction: Create a 'MeltingBorder' component using an SVG separator that looks like dripping paint. Place this at the bottom of the Hero section and top of the Footer.

graffiti_elements.instruction: Use absolute positioned text elements with 'mix-blend-overlay' or 'text-stroke' to create background chaotic text layers.

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (py-24 or py-32) to allow for large typography and floating elements.

Button.animation: Hover: Skew transformation (-3deg) + Glitch color shift.
Button.classes: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold font-anton border-2 border-transparent hover:border-white transition-all duration-200

Card.style: Glassmorphism with 'dirty' texture. No border radius or very slight (2px). High contrast borders.
Card.classes: bg-neutral-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-neutral-800 hover:border-[#FF1F1F] transition-colors duration-300

required_effects: Marquee text ('AUTHENTIC NAPOLETAN • STREET VIBES • LITTLE EAT ITALY')

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts imports to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIG TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include 'anton' and 'mono' font families and the custom color palette.
3. NOISE OVERLAY: Create a global NoiseOverlay component that sits on top of everything.
4. DRIPPY HEADERS: Ensure the Hero section has a 'dripping' bottom edge using SVG clip-path or an SVG divider.
5. USE PLACEHOLDERS: If images fail to load, use colorful div blocks with the text 'GRAFFITI ART' or 'PIZZA' in the center.
6. ANIMATIONS: Every section title should slide in or appear with a 'spray paint' reveal effect (opacity + scale).
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for the main background; use solid dark colors + noise.
Text must be readable; use shadows or dark overlays on images.
Buttons should feel 'tactile' and 'street' - avoid rounded pills.
